title: Open Files
summary: Lanes of invasion for your rooks

steps.title: Why Rooks Love Open Files
steps.text: Rooks are fearsome on open files (no pawns) or half-open files (no OWN pawn). Controlling an open file often decides games in the middlegame — especially one leading to the enemy king.

steps.title: Doubling & The 7th Rank
steps.text: The best file control is DOUBLED rooks (both rooks on the same file). From there, penetrate to the 7th rank — "pigs on the 7th" — where they attack pawns and trap the enemy king.
